Footer.description: The ultimate database for vehicle diagnostic trouble codes (DTC) and dashboard warning lights. Find symptoms, causes, and fixes.

CodePage.disclaimer: Disclaimer: This diagnostic code is part of the standard OBD2 system and can apply to {make} {model} models manufactured from 1996 to 2026. However, please note that the presence of this specific code depends on your vehicle's exact engine configuration, options, and production year.
CodePage.costIncludesParts: Includes parts and labor. May vary by location.

BlogPostPage.affiliateText: Some of the links on this page are affiliate links. This means that, at zero cost to you, OBD2HQ will earn an affiliate commission if you click through the link and finalize a purchase. We only recommend products we personally test and believe will add value to our readers.

LightsPage.title: Dashboard Warning Lights
LightsPage.subtitle: Select a warning light below to see what it means on your {make} {model}, common causes, and how to fix it immediately.

LightDetailPage.whatItMeans: What does this mean on a {make} {model}?
LightDetailPage.description: When you see the {lightName} illuminate on the dashboard of your {make} {model}, it is a direct warning from the vehicle's onboard computer. {description}

AboutPage.subtitle: We built OBD2HQ because we believe every car owner deserves to know exactly what's wrong with their vehicle before paying a mechanic.
AboutPage.missionDesc: To provide the world's most accurate, easily accessible, and comprehensive database of OBD-II diagnostic trouble codes.
AboutPage.verifiedDesc: Our data is aggregated from OEM repair manuals and verified by ASE-certified master technicians.
AboutPage.everyoneDesc: Whether you're a DIY enthusiast in your garage or a professional mechanic, our platform is built for you.
AboutPage.storyP1: The automotive industry has traditionally kept diagnostic information locked behind expensive proprietary software subscriptions. Mechanics charge hundreds of dollars just to "plug in the scanner." We started OBD2HQ to break this monopoly.
AboutPage.storyP2: By compiling data on over 48 global car manufacturers and analyzing over 10,000 specific Diagnostic Trouble Codes (DTCs), we've created a search engine specifically for your car's brain. From a simple loose gas cap (P0456) to a catastrophic hybrid battery failure (P0A80), you now have the knowledge to fix it faster.

ContactPage.title: Contact Us
ContactPage.subtitle: Have a question about a specific diagnostic code, or found an inaccuracy in our database? Let us know.
ContactPage.name: Name

DisclaimerPage.title: Medical & Technical Disclaimer
DisclaimerPage.warningText: Automotive repair can be dangerous and potentially fatal if performed incorrectly. Always consult a certified mechanic if you are unsure of your abilities.
DisclaimerPage.noAdviceText: The information contained on OBD2HQ is provided for informational and educational purposes only. It should not be construed as professional mechanical or engineering advice. While we strive to keep the information up to date and correct, we make no representations or warranties of any kind about the completeness, accuracy, reliability, or suitability of the diagnostic information provided.
DisclaimerPage.riskText: Any reliance you place on such information is therefore strictly at your own risk. Working on vehicles, especially high-voltage electrical systems (Hybrid/EV) or fuel systems, carries immense risk of injury, death, or catastrophic property damage. OBD2HQ and its creators are not liable for any damages, injuries, or financial losses incurred from using our database.

PrivacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
PrivacyPage.p1: OBD2HQ is a public diagnostic database. We do not require users to create an account or provide personal information to search for OBD2 codes. We may collect anonymous analytics data (such as pages visited or search queries) to improve our database accuracy.
PrivacyPage.p2: We use third-party advertising partners (such as Google AdSense) to serve ads when you visit our website. These companies may use cookies to serve ads based on your prior visits to our website or other websites.
PrivacyPage.p3: While we do not store sensitive personal information, we employ industry-standard security measures to protect the integrity of our diagnostic database and ensure a safe browsing experience.

TermsPage.title: Terms of Service
TermsPage.p1: By accessing and using OBD2HQ, you accept and agree to be bound by the terms and provision of this agreement.
TermsPage.p2: The information provided on OBD2HQ is for educational and informational purposes only. We do not guarantee the absolute accuracy of the diagnostic data. Automotive repair involves inherent risks.

SearchPage.title: Search Results for "{query}"
SearchPage.codeDesc: We found the standard definition for {code}: {title}. However, to give you accurate repair instructions, you must select your car manufacturer first.
SearchPage.selectCar: Select your car manufacturer to view {code} details:
SearchPage.noResultsDesc: We couldn't find any OBD2 codes or car models matching "{query}". Try searching for a standard P-code like "P0420" or a car brand like "Ford".
